behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names hook path components/table/hooks/useFilledColumns, demo path components/table/demo/column-defaults.tsx, test file Table.test.tsx, the prop name 'column', special columns Table.SELECTION_COLUMN/EXPAND_COLUMN, and lint commands.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes behavior and API surface but doesn't dictate exact code changes; it mentions @rc-component/util utilities but leaves implementation choices to the agent.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check the hook's externally observable contract (referential identity for falsy defaults, alignment inheritance, special column preservation, children omission) which any correct implementation should satisfy.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute via tsx subprocess and run npm test/lint subprocesses, calling the hook and Table component rather than just grepping files.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests verify concrete behaviors like filled[0].align==='center', filled[1]===Table.EXPAND_COLUMN, and result===columns identity; a stub returning [] or pass-through would fail multiple tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover prop acceptance, hook existence, defaults application, identity preservation, special columns, nested groups, children filtering, integration, demo file, and Table tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with docstrings and separated into f2p and pass-to-pass sections via comment banner.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output; this is a UI component feature.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers (useFilledColumns, column-defaults.tsx, Table.SELECTION_COLUMN) appear consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names hook location and demo file but doesn't pinpoint specific lines or exact code in InternalTable.tsx beyond saying the prop must be stripped.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only task, not an agentmd config edit task.
